overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The journey progresses from a covered sidewalk beside a glass tower, across a wide intersection with digital billboards, through a dark industrial underpass, and into a commercial market area.

events.description: approaching wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking along covered sidewalk next to a building with concrete stairs, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: two people sitting on concrete stairs watching the street

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with distinctive vertical yellow neon lighting strips
wide concrete stairs with people sitting on the steps
illuminated shop signs and advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered sidewalk beside a massive glass tower with vertical yellow neon strips. Concrete stairs on the left have NPCs sitting and observing. The camera moves forward toward an intersection where yellow crosswalk lines become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection with yellow zebra crossing

events.description: steps onto yellow crosswalk lines entering the wide intersection
black vehicle passes from right to left in front of the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection following yellow crosswalk lines while navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright green hair walking ahead in the crosswalk
black luxury sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
massive illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful neon advertisements
tall palm trees visible against the dusk sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection with prominent yellow crosswalk lines. Large digital billboards glow with neon advertisements on the right. The camera crosses with a moderate crowd including a distinctive pedestrian with green hair, while vehicles pass through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition into highway underpass with concrete pillars

events.description: enters shadow of highway overpass, lighting shifts to artificial sources

agents.ego_description: walking into the covered area beneath the highway overpass, moving from open sky to shadow

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking ahead into the underpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure overhead blocking the sky
thick industrial concrete columns supporting the overpass
orange-yellow metal barriers separating sidewalk from road

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadow of a massive highway overpass, transitioning from the open intersection into a semi-covered corridor. Concrete support pillars line the right side with yellow safety railings. The lighting shifts dramatically to artificial sources as the natural dusk light fades.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial underpass with vending machines and graffiti

events.description: passing red vending machine and illuminated advertisement screens on left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit underpass, passing vending machines and concrete walls

notable_agents.action: person standing at red vending machine on the left sidewalk

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machine with illuminated display
large backlit advertisement panels mounted on the underpass walls
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: Deep within the highway underpass, the scene is dominated by artificial lighting from vending machines and advertisement screens. The walls feature graffiti and industrial concrete textures. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions while vehicles pass on the right. The space feels enclosed and urban-industrial.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial market street with open sky and shop stalls

events.description: exits the underpass into a brighter commercial area with market stalls
natural dusk light returns as the overpass ends and sky becomes visible

agents.ego_description: emerging from the dark underpass into a lively market street with more pedestrians and commercial activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking away from the camera on the left

entered.detail: street vendors with illuminated stalls and merchandise displays
colorful fabric awnings extending from storefronts
pedestrian bridge or elevated highway structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dark underpass into a bustling commercial market street. Natural dusk light returns as the overpass ends. Market stalls with bright displays line the right side while shop awnings cover the left. The crowd density increases with pedestrians browsing the street vendors, creating a lively atmosphere distinct from the industrial underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sleek corporate district through a dark industrial underpass and into a vibrant commercial market. It begins on a covered sidewalk beside a glass tower with yellow neon strips, moving past concrete stairs and NPCs toward a wide intersection. As the camera crosses the street, the environment opens up into a bright expanse of digital billboards and crowds before shifting abruptly into the heavy shadows of a massive highway overpass. The scene then transitions into a claustrophobic, urban-industrial corridor dominated by graffiti, vending machines, and artificial light, where the natural dusk fades entirely. Finally, the camera exits the enclosure as the overpass ends, emerging back into the natural light of a bustling market street filled with colorful stalls and dense crowds of pedestrians.
